scenario: The impact subject is queried under a policy-limited view. One impact edge is visible inside the view; a matching impact edge sits in a sibling sparse slice the policy view does not admit; and a policy projection hides three members from the view. The explainer packet must keep the visible edge, count the sibling edge as out-of-scope, and disclose the hidden policy members through the scope descriptor so policy-limited results are labeled rather than silently dropped.
